bootstrap_context.branch_transition_reason: novali-v6 reached accepted closeout at rc88.1 with preserved governance invariants, evidence-only telemetry and alerts, read-only adapter gates, controller isolation, and clean package hygiene, so novali-v7 is the next active clean baseline while novali-v6 becomes the frozen historical reference line.

directive_spec.clarified_intent_summary: Initialize novali-v7 as the clean baseline reset from frozen novali-v6 rc88.1, preserving directive-first bootstrap, canonical artifact authority, proof-chain continuity, and bounded-governance constraints before governed execution.
constraints: do not change frozen benchmark semantics
directive_spec.directive_text: Initialize novali-v7 from frozen novali-v6 rc88.1 as the clean active baseline, preserving canonical artifact authority, inherited governance invariants, and bounded execution posture before any future v7 planning work.

milestone_model.completion_signal: formal directive file is parsed into a valid DirectiveSpec
canonical governance artifacts are materialized or loaded deterministically
governed runtime startup reads artifact-backed authority before execution

stop_conditions: startup would fall back to raw freeform initialization
startup would change routing, thresholds, live policy, or benchmark semantics
success_criteria: a directive file alone can initialize a fresh novali-v7 instance
restart succeeds from persisted canonical governance state
raw freeform initialization is not the authority path
clarification occurs before activation when required fields are missing or ambiguous
artifact-backed authority is established before governed execution begins
